'''ladhaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:practicableness|practicableness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-dh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:practicableness|practicableness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ladhaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lædhæyæth|lædhæyæth]] || [[word:lædhæyæj|lædhæyæj]] || [[word:lædhæyæsh|lædhæyæsh]] || [[word:lædhæyæ|lædhæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ladhadhayath|ladhadhayath]] || [[word:ladhadhayaj|ladhadhayaj]] || [[word:ladhadhayash|ladhadhayash]] || [[word:ladhadhaya|ladhadhaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ladhayath|ladhayath]] || [[word:ladhayaj|ladhayaj]] || [[word:ladhayash|ladhayash]] || [[word:ladhaya|ladhaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ladhafyath|ladhafyath]] || [[word:ladhafyaj|ladhafyaj]] || [[word:ladhafyash|ladhafyash]] || [[word:ladhafyaf|ladhafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ladhayatha|ladhayatha]] || [[word:ladhayaja|ladhayaja]] || [[word:ladhayasha|ladhayasha]] || [[word:ladhayaka|ladhayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ladhayath|ladhayath]] || [[word:ladhayaj|ladhayaj]] || [[word:ladhayash|ladhayash]] || [[word:ladhaya|ladhaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ladhayathal|ladhayathal]] || [[word:ladhayajal|ladhayajal]] || [[word:ladhayashal|ladhayashal]] || [[word:ladhayakal|ladhayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ladhayathatha|ladhayathatha]] || [[word:ladhayajaja|ladhayajaja]] || [[word:ladhayashasha|ladhayashasha]] || [[word:ladhayaka|ladhayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ladhayathan|ladhayathan]] || [[word:ladhayajan|ladhayajan]] || [[word:ladhayashan|ladhayashan]] || [[word:ladhayakan|ladhayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ladhayathaoro|ladhayathaoro]] || [[word:ladhayajaoro|ladhayajaoro]] || [[word:ladhayashaoro|ladhayashaoro]] || [[word:ladhayakaoro|ladhayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
